name: file-local
description: Local-filesystem artifact provider. URIs are `file-local:<relative-path>` resolved against the current worktree. Supports the full CRUD + lock + progress contract; progress is tracked in a sibling `.progress.jsonl` file. Used by the `file-local` artifact kind and as the default backing for `document` and `preferences` when their specialized providers are absent. contract_version 1.
